heading: Edit a stream processing workspace
body:
To edit an stream processing workspace:**Edit-spi-cli:**Atlas CLITo update one stream processing workspace in the project you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas api streams updateStreamWorkspace [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas api streams updateStreamWorkspace](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-api-streams-updateStreamWorkspace).**Edit-spi-api:**Atlas Administration APIThe Atlas Administration API provides an endpoint for editing a
stream processing workspace.[Update One Stream Workspace](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-updategroupstreamworkspace)
